properties.name: app.jwt-secret
properties.description: HS256 signing secret for application JWTs. Must be at least 32 bytes.

properties.name: app.jwt-issuer
properties.description: Expected JWT issuer for tokens accepted by the backend.

properties.name: app.evidence-storage-path
properties.description: Filesystem root used for local evidence file storage.

properties.name: app.max-evidence-file-size-bytes
properties.description: Maximum allowed evidence upload size in bytes.

properties.name: app.rate-limit.enabled
properties.description: Enables in-memory API and authentication rate limiting.

properties.name: app.rate-limit.api-requests-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum authenticated API requests per minute per user and organization.

properties.name: app.rate-limit.auth-requests-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum login/register requests per minute per client IP address.

properties.name: app.rate-limit.login-failures-per-window
properties.description: Maximum failed login attempts allowed per email and client IP before temporary lockout.

properties.name: app.rate-limit.login-failure-window-seconds
properties.description: Login failure lockout window length in seconds.
